message:
fix: decode JPEG to RGBA for Kitty graphics over SSH

Kitty graphics protocol doesn't support JPEG directly (only PNG and raw
pixels). The SHM path correctly decoded JPEG but was disabled for SSH.
The base64 fallback was sending raw JPEG bytes with format=32 (RGBA),
which Kitty couldn't understand.

Now the base64 path properly decodes JPEG to RGBA, compresses with zlib,
and sends as raw pixel data.
